subject: Adding AAF basic auth filter
commit_message:
Adding AAF basic auth filter

Adding a AAF Cadi filter. Setting the environment property NO_AUTH to true will disable authentication, which can be used for development purposes. The AAF is configured to communicate with Beijing AAF instance in the Windriver lab

Change-Id: I0f98bb05ac380c1e04855bb23ebe309462fb053a
Issue-ID: AAI-32
Signed-off-by: Pavel Paroulek <pavel.paroulek@orange.com>
